message:
fix: schema default, _beads support, init env vars

Closes #177, closes #178, closes #179

Bug #177: Add `br doctor` check for NULL values in events.actor,
events.created_at, and comments.created_at columns. The schema fix
(DEFAULT '' on events.actor) was already applied in 9ed1318; this
adds recovery/remediation guidance via the new db.null_defaults
doctor check, which reports the exact UPDATE SQL to fix affected rows.

Bug #178: Relax BEADS_DIR validation to accept `_beads` in addition
to `.beads`. Monorepos that disallow dot-directories can now use
`_beads` as the workspace directory name. Updated walk-up discovery,
db-path derivation, redirect validation, route resolution, and
external project resolution to all use the new `is_beads_dir_name`
helper.

Bug #179: `br init` now honors the BEADS_DIR environment variable.
When set, init creates the workspace at the specified path instead
of always using `./.beads`. Display output also uses the actual
directory path instead of hardcoding `.beads/`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
